path: Problem: Return the first non-error value from a left-to-right range, otherwise return blank
Action: Use IFNA to suppress #N/A, INDEX to return a value by position, MATCH to find the last valid position via a numeric lookup trick, and ERROR.TYPE to convert errors into numbers

Observation: MATCH with lookup_value 3 against an array of 1/2 values (from ERROR.TYPE on a filtered COLUMN array) returns the position of the rightmost non-#N/A entry; INDEX then returns that entry, and IFNA blanks the result when all entries are #N/A
